"Welcome to HackMSIT — where innovation meets legacy."

The Flagship Event

HACKMSIT 2026

Code. Build. Lead.

The Legacy Continues

HackMSIT 2026 is more than a hackathon; it's a testament to innovation rooted in strong foundations. Inspired by the strategic brilliance and undefeated spirit of Maharaja Surajmal, we invite builders to construct the technology of tomorrow.

For 48 hours, the brightest minds from across the nation will gather in the heart of Delhi to ideate, collaborate, and push the boundaries of what's possible in web3, AI, and software.

48h
Hacking
₹5L+
Prizes
1k+
Builders

Innovation Tracks

Choose your battlefield. Dive deep into specialized domains and sculpt solutions that define the future.

Web3 & Blockchain

Build decentralized solutions, smart contracts, and define the new internet of trust.

AI & Machine Learning

Push the boundaries of intelligence. Create models that solve real-world problems.

Open Innovation

No boundaries, no limits. Solve anything that matters and bring a unique perspective.

Royal Edicts (FAQ)

Who can participate?

Any enrolled college student across India can apply to join the fray.

Is it free?

Yes, participation is completely free. We cover your stay, food, and internet during the 48 hours.

What should I bring?

Your laptop, chargers, valid college ID, and the undying spirit to build something amazing.

HACKMSIT '26

Maharaja Surajmal Institute of Technology, C-4 Janakpuri, New Delhi.
